description: NC DHHS: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area; specialty ORs per FGI 2022 as adopted.
citation: 10A NCAC 14C .1800 / NC DHHS Health Care Regulation

description: NC DHHS: Single-occupancy patient rooms minimum 120 sq ft; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per bed.
NC DHHS: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear floor area; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
NC DHHS: Emergency treatment spaces minimum 120 sq ft per space.
NC DHHS: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
NC DHHS: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
NC DHHS: Certificate of Need required for new hospitals and capital expenditures above the state threshold (~$1.5M for medical equipment, $2M for construction). NC is a CON state.
citation: NC Gen. Stat. §131E Article 9 — Certificate of Need

description: NC DHHS: All hospital construction must comply with NC State Building Code (NCSBC) Healthcare Occupancy requirements and be reviewed by NC Office of State Fire Marshal.
citation: NC State Building Code / NC OSF review requirement
